features.name: concatenation in combinational block with clocked feedback
features.description: Code should include a concatenation in a combinational always block where one operand is a register that receives its value from a non-blocking assignment in a clocked always block

features.name: byte pair concatenation for width conversion
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of two 8-bit values to create a 16-bit word, where the first part uses a registered value and the second part uses fresh input data
